Off Calendar Aug-29-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendant's Motion to Remove Judicial Arbitration from Calendar is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Case is ordered removed from Judicial Arbitration. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Court ordered case set for Jury Trial on 2/23/2004 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206. Court to give notice of the Trial date and Mandatory Settlement Conference. Proceedings reported by: Christina Paxton. (212).
